lacks_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: lacks_proof_of_belgian_nationality
lacks_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person does not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_foreigner.name: is_foreigner
is_foreigner.description: The person is legally classified as a foreigner.

lacks_union_citizenship.name: lacks_union_citizenship
lacks_union_citizenship.description: The person is not a citizen of the Union.

not_covered_by_free_movement_law.name: not_covered_by_free_movement_law
not_covered_by_free_movement_law.description: The person is not covered by Union free movement law as referred to in the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is legally classified as a third-country national.

present_on_territory.name: present_on_territory
present_on_territory.description: The person is present on the territory.

does_not_meet_entry_or_stay_conditions.name: does_not_meet_entry_or_stay_conditions
does_not_meet_entry_or_stay_conditions.description: The person does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

has_illegal_stay.name: has_illegal_stay
has_illegal_stay.description: The person is legally classified as being in illegal stay.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The person is subject to a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_gran.name: subject_to_international_protection_granting_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_gran.description: The person is subject to a procedure for granting international protection.

subject_to_responsibility_determination_.name: subject_to_responsibility_determination_or_transfer_procedure
subject_to_responsibility_determination_.description: The person is subject to a procedure for determining the responsible state for an international protection request or for transfer to that state.

subject_to_relevant_absconding_risk_proc.name: subject_to_relevant_absconding_risk_procedure
subject_to_relevant_absconding_risk_proc.description: The person is subject to one of the procedures relevant to assessing risk of absconding.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the person's situation has been performed.

all_case_circumstances_considered.name: all_case_circumstances_considered
all_case_circumstances_considered.description: All circumstances specific to the person's case have been considered.

current_and_real_absconding_concern.name: current_and_real_absconding_concern
current_and_real_absconding_concern.description: There is a current and real concern that the person will abscond.

no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.name: no_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_stay
no_residence_application_after_illegal_e.description: The person filed no residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay.

late_international_protection_request.name: late_international_protection_request
late_international_protection_request.description: The person did not make an international protection request within the legally provided time limit.

no_or_late_application_criterion_met.name: no_or_late_application_criterion_met
no_or_late_application_criterion_met.description: The objective absconding-risk criterion concerning no residence application or late protection request is met.

used_false_or_misleading_information_or_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_unlawful_means
used_false_or_misleading_information_or_.description: The person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, fraud, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

noncooperation_with_immigration_authorit.name: noncooperation_with_immigration_authorities
noncooperation_with_immigration_authorit.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for immigration-law enforcement or supervision.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_trans.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or failed to comply with, a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_activ.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_active_entry_ban
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_activ.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or failed to comply with, an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_coercive_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_less_.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or failed to comply with, a less coercive measure intended to guarantee transfer, refusal of entry, or removal.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_publi.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_public_order_or_security_restriction
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_publi.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or failed to comply with, a restrictive measure intended to guarantee public order or national security.

unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.name: unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equivalent_other_member_state_measure
unwilling_or_failed_to_comply_with_equiv.description: The person made clear unwillingness to comply with, or failed to comply with, an equivalent measure taken by another member state.

measure_noncompliance_criterion_met.name: measure_noncompliance_criterion_met
measure_noncompliance_criterion_met.description: The objective absconding-risk criterion concerning noncompliance with a relevant measure is met.

subject_to_active_entry_ban.name: subject_to_active_entry_ban
subject_to_active_entry_ban.description: The person is subject to an entry ban that has not been lifted or suspended.

new_application_immediately_after_negati.name: new_application_immediately_after_negative_decision_or_measure
new_application_immediately_after_negati.description: The person filed a new residence application or international protection request immediately after a refusal, termination, refusal-of-entry, or removal decision or measure.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsible_state_when_questioned
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_responsi.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously given fingerprints in another state bound by responsibility-determination rules after making an international protection request.

multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.name: multiple_applications_with_negative_or_no_residence_outcome
multiple_applications_with_negative_or_n.description: The person filed multiple international protection requests or residence applications that led to negative decisions or no residence title.

concealed_prior_protection_request_in_re.name: concealed_prior_protection_request_in_responsible_state_when_questioned
concealed_prior_protection_request_in_re.description: When questioned, the person concealed having previously made an international protection request in another state bound by responsibility-determination rules.

came_for_other_purpose_than_application_.name: came_for_other_purpose_than_application_purpose
came_for_other_purpose_than_application_.description: The person declared or the file shows that the person came to the territory for purposes other than those of the protection request or residence application.

fined_for_manifestly_abusive_appeal.name: fined_for_manifestly_abusive_appeal
fined_for_manifestly_abusive_appeal.description: The person is subject to a fine for filing a manifestly unlawful appeal before the competent alien-law litigation body.

one_or_more_objective_absconding_criteri.name: one_or_more_objective_absconding_criteria_met
one_or_more_objective_absconding_criteri.description: At least one statutory objective criterion for risk of absconding is met for the person.

risk_of_absconding.name: risk_of_absconding
risk_of_absconding.description: The person is legally considered to present a risk of absconding.

has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_do.name: has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_document
has_valid_travel_passport_or_identity_do.description: The person possesses a valid travel document, passport, or identity document.

recognized_as_national_and_laissez_passe.name: recognized_as_national_and_laissez_passer_promised
recognized_as_national_and_laissez_passe.description: The national authority of the person's country recognized the person as a national and declared willingness to issue a laissez-passer.

belongs_to_minister_laissez_passer_natio.name: belongs_to_minister_laissez_passer_nationality_category
belongs_to_minister_laissez_passer_natio.description: The person belongs to a nationality category for which the minister can issue a laissez-passer.

identification_condition_met.name: identification_condition_met
identification_condition_met.description: One of the statutory identification conditions for a foreigner is met.

is_identified_foreigner.name: is_identified_foreigner
is_identified_foreigner.description: The person is legally classified as an identified foreigner.
